mapper.select: SELECT arm.authrt_id, arm.role_id, arm.use_bgng_dt, arm.use_end_dt, arm.frst_reg_dt, arm.frst_reg_user_id, arm.last_chg_dt, arm.last_chg_user_id, a.authrt_nm, a.authrt_desc FROM com.tn_sys_authrt_role_mpng arm JOIN com.tn_sys_authrt a ON a.authrt_id = arm.authrt_id AND NOW() BETWEEN a.use_bgng_dt AND a.use_end_dt WHERE arm.role_id = #{roleId} AND NOW() BETWEEN arm.use_bgng_dt AND arm.use_end_dt ORDER BY arm.authrt_id

SELECT arm.authrt_id, arm.role_id, arm.use_bgng_dt, arm.use_end_dt, arm.frst_reg_dt, arm.frst_reg_user_id, arm.last_chg_dt, arm.last_chg_user_id, r.role_nm FROM com.tn_sys_authrt_role_mpng arm JOIN com.tn_role r ON r.role_id = arm.role_id AND NOW() BETWEEN r.use_bgng_dt AND r.use_end_dt WHERE arm.authrt_id = #{authrtId} AND NOW() BETWEEN arm.use_bgng_dt AND arm.use_end_dt ORDER BY arm.role_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tn_sys_authrt_role_mpng (authrt_id, role_id, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{authrtId}, #{roleId}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
